changeSet.author: CIV developer Group

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM clinlims.observation_history_type WHERE type_name = 'BacterioTypeExamens'

changeSet.author: CIV developer Group

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM clinlims.observation_history_type WHERE type_name = 'PrescriptionType'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.observation_history_type(id, type_name, description,lastupdated) VALUES (nextval('observation_history_type_seq'),'PrescriptionType','Prescription Order',now()), (nextval('observation_history_type_seq'),'Urgence','Urgence ',now());

changeSet.author: CIV developer Group

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM clinlims.observation_history_type WHERE type_name = 'Germ Identification'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.observation_history_type(id, type_name, description,lastupdated) VALUES (nextval('observation_history_type_seq'),'Germ Identification','Germ Identification',now()), (nextval('observation_history_type_seq'),'Bacteria','Bacteria',now()), (nextval('observation_history_type_seq'),'Culture','Culture',now());
